calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Sep-12-2007 Amended

AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Janet Pond.
Petitioner: Xiang Wu, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Jiaming Tan, and with Cantonese Interpreter: Jenna Zhang.
No appearance by the Co-Petitioner/Minor's Father: Samson Tam, but signed the Petition consenting to the name change of the Minor.
Petitioner and Interpreter were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name of the Minor were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Gary Woming Tam.
Decree signed in open court.
